properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Praise Him, praise Him Praise Him, praise Him Jesus, blessed savior He's worthy to be praised

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Praise Him, praise Him Praise Him, praise Him Jesus, blessed savior (Jesus, blessed savior) He's worthy to be praised (He's worthy to be praised)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: From the rising of the sun Until the going down of the saint He is worthy, Jesus is worthy He's worthy to be praised

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Glory, glory (oh, let's give God the glory) Glory, glory (oh, let's give Him the glory) Jesus, blessed savior (blessed savior) He's worthy to be praised (He's worthy to be praised)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: God is our rock (is our rock) Hope of salvation (He's our hope of salvation) A strong Deliverer (a strong deliverer) In Him will I always trust (in Him will I, oh, trust)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Praise Him, praise Him (oh, let us praise Him) Praise Him, praise Him (oh, let us praise Him) Jesus, blessed savior (blessed savior) He's worthy to be praised (He's worthy to be praised)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: God is our rock (is our rock) Hope of salvation (He's our hope of salvation) A strong Deliverer In Him will I always trust (in Him will I trust)

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Praise Him, praise Him (oh, let us praise Him) Praise Him, praise Him (oh, let us praise Him) Jesus, blessed savior (blessed savior) He's worthy to be praised (He's worthy to be praised) Worthy to be praised (worthy to be praised)
